creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
clsung      2008-01-07 02:57:46 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/p5-WWW-Mixi-Scraper Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This is yet another 'mixi' (the largest SNS in Japan) scraper,
  powered by Web::Scraper. Though APIs are different and incompatible with
  precedent WWW::Mixi.
  
  Author: Kenichi Ishigaki <ishigaki@cpan.org>
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/~ishigaki/WWW-Mixi-Scraper/
  
  PR:             ports/119125
  Submitted by:   Masahiro Teramoto <markun at onohara.to>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1936    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +50 -0     ports/www/p5-WWW-Mixi-Scraper/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/p5-WWW-Mixi-Scraper/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/www/p5-WWW-Mixi-Scraper/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/www/p5-WWW-Mixi-Scraper/pkg-plist (new)
